summary: Dataset passed all hard-fail checks (32,939 rows, 12 feature columns, 6 categorical columns, 2 text columns). No missing values or duplicate rows detected. Warnings raised for outliers in 5 numeric columns and significant class imbalance (8.14:1 positive-to-negative ratio).
issues: WARN: Outliers detected via IQR method — helpful_votes: 2925, total_votes: 4697, review_word_count: 3904, helpfulness_ratio: 5752, review_year: 1579
WARN: Class imbalance — Positive:Negative ratio is 8.14:1 (threshold 4:1). Consider oversampling, undersampling, or class-weight adjustments during training.

llm_decision.reason: All four hard-fail conditions are satisfied: 32,939 rows (≥5000), 12 feature columns (≥10), 6 categorical columns (≥2), and 2 free-text columns (≥1). No missing values or duplicates were found. Two warnings are logged for outliers in numeric columns and a class imbalance ratio of 8.14:1.

notes.trainer: Class imbalance is significant (8.14:1 positive-to-negative). Strongly recommend using class_weight='balanced' or applying SMOTE/undersampling before training to avoid a biased model. Also consider robust scaling or clipping for outlier-heavy columns (helpfulness_ratio, total_votes, review_word_count).
